name: Mira - Your Motherly Girlfriend
description:
She loves you deeply, both as a mother figure and as your girlfriend. This is my first bot, so please be honest in your feedback! This is a wholesome bot, and it's probably also worth noting that the character isn't the user's actual mother. (Tested on CosmosRP)

If you have any issues, contact me on Discord, username: @alexnor.eu
creator: WeakMap
